$comment: Wave-53 — outcomes registry. Each outcome is a NAMED, MACHINE-CHECKABLE definition of 'done'. The orchestrator wraps dispatches with outcome checks: dispatch → check → if not met, dispatch again. Cap iterations with `budget`. Add new outcomes by appending to this list and shipping a corresponding wave.

outcomes.name: design-drift-zero-heights
outcomes.description: All raw control heights (h-5..h-16 on interactive elements) replaced with h-cta / h-control / h-chip / h-icon tokens.

outcomes.name: design-drift-zero-text-px
outcomes.description: All raw pixel text sizes (text-[12px+]) replaced with Tailwind text-* scale.

outcomes.name: design-drift-zero-tinted-files
outcomes.description: Tinted-surface files (bg-{color}-500/N) migrated to Toast pattern (surface + colored border).

outcomes.name: funnel-coupling-complete
outcomes.description: Every vertical-pack template in PipelineTemplateSelector.tsx is decisioned — either carries a funnelTemplateId reference to Registry A, or carries a TODO(wave-49c) comment explaining why no Registry A match exists yet.
outcomes.check: node -e "const f=require('fs').readFileSync('components/pipeline/PipelineTemplateSelector.tsx','utf8'); const total=(f.match(/isVerticalPack: true/g)||[]).length; const wired=(f.match(/funnelTemplateId: \"/g)||[]).length; const todos=(f.match(/TODO\\(wave-49c\\)/g)||[]).length; process.exit(total === wired + todos ? 0 : 1);"

outcomes.name: audit-backlog-clean
outcomes.description: No ESCALATED proposals (age >= 5 waves) in the audit backlog.

outcomes.name: typecheck-clean
outcomes.description: TypeScript compiles cleanly across the repo.
